metadata.title: Telecom + satellite/ground-station + TV-network layer - the connectivity rail that carries identity, payments, AI backhaul AND surveillance
metadata.frame: The 'pipes' beneath the bubble. Two findings dominate: (1) CONSOLIDATION - the connectivity layer is being absorbed by the SAME AI-core owners (Amazon buys Globalstar; SpaceX runs Starlink/Starshield; Apple funds Globalstar; Oracle holds TikTok data, see spec-exchanges-asia); (2) SURVEILLANCE EXPOSURE - the legally-mandated CALEA wiretap backdoor was breached by China's Salt Typhoon, validating the repo's core anti-backdoor thesis (a mandated surveillance capability becomes an adversary's open door - the same logic as age-verification-abolition.md and Snowden/Bullrun).
metadata.provenance: Web-verified 2026-06-08 (Wikipedia/CRS/Senate Commerce for Salt Typhoon, SpaceNews/Via Satellite/CNBC for satellite deals, SEC 6-K/StockTitan for Telesat, T-Mobile/SpaceX for direct-to-cell). Promo flagged.

facts: China MSS-linked 'Salt Typhoon' infiltrated US telecom infrastructure starting ~2021; ~nine carriers acknowledged incl. Verizon, AT&T, T-Mobile, Spectrum (Charter), Lumen, Consolidated Communications, Windstream.

They COMPROMISED THE CALEA LAWFUL-INTERCEPT SYSTEM - the court-authorized wiretap apparatus US law REQUIRES carriers to maintain - turning it into a foreign-intelligence open door: real-time location tracking of millions, call recording, text reading.
Accessed call/text METADATA of >1,000,000 users (timestamps, source/dest IPs, phone numbers).
FBI: 200+ US organizations, 80+ countries targeted. Called 'the worst telecom hack in American history.'
AT&T/Verizon claimed eviction (Dec 2024); US officials + experts say the actors may persist; FCC ordered telecoms to secure networks; Senate Commerce (Cantwell) demanded answers into 2026.
salt_typhoon.thesis_significance: THE CLEANEST PROOF of the repo's anti-backdoor argument: a MANDATED surveillance capability (CALEA) became the exact vector of catastrophic compromise. This is age-verification-abolition.md's 'if IDs are ever breached, IDs become meaningless' generalized to the wiretap layer - and the Bullrun (Snowden) crypto-weakening lineage. You cannot build a backdoor only the 'good guys' can use.

us_telecoms.name: Verizon
facts: Salt Typhoon victim.
$100M strategic commitment to AST SpaceMobile for direct-to-cell; FCC granted AST access to Verizon spectrum.

us_telecoms.name: AT&T
facts: Salt Typhoon victim.
Commercial agreement with AST SpaceMobile (~$20M revenue commitment); AT&T spectrum used by AST.

us_telecoms.name: T-Mobile
facts: Salt Typhoon victim.
T-Satellite with Starlink - commercial direct-to-cell launched Jul 2025 (SpaceX partnership); FCC approved Starlink Direct to Cell Nov 2024.

us_telecoms.name: Deutsche Telekom / Zain / Tata Communications
us_telecoms.role: global telecom + Hedera council node operators
facts: Govern Hedera + run consensus nodes (fin-hedera-connections) - telecoms as DLT/identity-rail operators.

satellite_connectivity.name: SpaceX Starlink / Starshield
facts: Starlink: ~10M+ subs, direct-to-cell with T-Mobile.
STARSHIELD: military LEO for NRO + Space Development Agency + US Space Force - target tracking, optical/radio recon, missile warning; 183+ launched by 2025.
Starlink is also the AI-compute-reseller wildcard (fin-spacex-spcx: Google/Anthropic cancelable compute).
satellite_connectivity.significance: One private actor owns civil broadband, direct-to-cell, AND the recon/missile-warning constellation - connectivity + ISR concentrated.

satellite_connectivity.name: Globalstar (GSAT)
facts: Apple invested $1.7B (Nov 2024): $1.1B prepay for a new constellation + $400M for 20% of a Globalstar subsidiary; ~85% of new capacity exclusive to Apple devices (iPhone satellite SOS/messaging).
THEN Amazon announced acquisition of Globalstar for ~$11.6B - pulling a satellite carrier into the Amazon (AWS/Kuiper/Anthropic) core.
satellite_connectivity.significance: DOUBLE CORE BRIDGE: Apple (consumer) funds it, Amazon (AI-core) buys it. The satellite-to-phone layer absorbed by hyperscalers.

satellite_connectivity.name: AST SpaceMobile (ASTS)
facts: FCC-cleared 248-sat direct-to-cell constellation using AT&T + Verizon spectrum; Verizon $100M + AT&T ~$20M commitments; rival to Starlink direct-to-cell.

satellite_connectivity.name: Telesat Lightspeed (TSAT)
facts: $708M Lightspeed capex in 2025; $530.2M FY2025 net loss; backlog ~$1.1B.

Mar 2026: added 500 MHz of dedicated MILITARY Ka-band to its 156-sat initial constellation; first production sats Dec 2026; ~96 in orbit by end-2027; full commercial+military service Q1 2028; Orange + Vocus terrestrial partners.
satellite_connectivity.significance: The dual-use (commercial+military) LEO pattern repeating; heavy losses funding a strategic asset (state-as-anchor, like the defense/PQC plays).

satellite_connectivity.name: WISeSat / SEALSQ
facts: QS7001-bearing LEO sats on SpaceX rideshare; QSOC (see fin-sealsq-wisekey-global). The PQC/identity node of the sat layer.

ground_stations_and_tv.ground_segment: Ground stations/teleports (AWS Ground Station, KSAT, Viasat Real-Time Earth) are the terrestrial chokepoints for satellite data - AWS Ground Station puts a hyperscaler in the downlink path (another Amazon-in-the-pipe node). Generic detail; flagged for deeper pass if needed.
ground_stations_and_tv.tv_media: TV/broadcast + satellite distribution converges with the AI-content thread: OpenAI's Sora vs Disney IP (fin-disney-openai-sora) and the ad/brand-safety-censorship apparatus (influence-ad-censorship). The distribution pipe (cable/satellite/streaming CDNs) is where AI-generated content meets identity-gated access and ad-targeting - the same identity layer the digital-ID thread tracks.

edges.notes: China MSS breached 9+ carriers via the CALEA wiretap backdoor; 1M+ users' metadata; the mandated-backdoor-becomes-open-door proof.
$1.1B prepay + $400M for 20% of a subsidiary; ~85% capacity exclusive to Apple.
~$11.6B Amazon acquisition of Globalstar - satellite carrier into the AWS/Kuiper/Anthropic core. CORE BRIDGE.
~$20M revenue commitment; AST uses AT&T spectrum.
Starshield ISR/missile-warning constellation for NRO/SDA/Space Force; 183+ sats.
500 MHz dedicated military Ka-band on Lightspeed; dual-use LEO; full service Q1 2028.

assessment: The connectivity rail - the literal pipes carrying identity, payments, AI backhaul and surveillance - shows the same two dynamics as the rest of the corpus. CONSOLIDATION INTO THE CORE: Amazon is acquiring Globalstar (~$11.6B) after Apple's $1.7B; SpaceX owns Starlink + the Starshield ISR constellation; Oracle holds TikTok's US data (spec-exchanges-asia); AWS Ground Station sits in the downlink path. The satellite-to-phone and ground layers are being absorbed by the same hyperscaler/Musk owners that anchor the AI core - vertical integration of compute -> connectivity -> ISR. SURVEILLANCE EXPOSURE: Salt Typhoon's compromise of the CALEA lawful-intercept system across Verizon/AT&T/T-Mobile/etc. is the empirical proof of this repo's anti-backdoor thesis - a surveillance capability the state MANDATED became the precise channel for the worst telecom breach in US history, exposing 1M+ Americans. This is the same lesson as age-verification-abolition (breached IDs are worse than no IDs) and the Snowden/Bullrun crypto-weakening lineage (Task #7). DUAL-USE militarization (Starshield, Telesat Mil-Ka, WISeSat secure elements) recurs. Graded as real infrastructure (not froth) with two through-lines: ownership concentration into the AI-core, and mandated-backdoor fragility. Bridges Amazon/Apple/SpaceX/Oracle (core) to the connectivity layer; carried into the graph.
